title: Basic CRUD — Contact API
description:
### Your Task

Build a complete REST API for managing Contacts. Same pattern as Challenge 01 — different domain.

### Requirements

- Create a `Contact` entity with fields: `id` (Long, auto-generated), `firstName` (String), `lastName` (String), `email` (String), `phone` (String)
- Create a `ContactRepository` extending `JpaRepository`
- Create a `ContactController` at `/api/contacts` with CRUD endpoints

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/contacts` → Return all contacts (200 OK)
- `GET /api/contacts/{id}` → Return contact by ID (200 OK, or 404 if not found)
- `POST /api/contacts` → Create contact (201 Created)
- `PUT /api/contacts/{id}` → Update contact (200 OK, or 404 if not found)
- `DELETE /api/contacts/{id}` → Delete contact (204 No Content, or 404 if not found)

### Key Concepts

- `@Entity`, `@Id`, `@GeneratedValue`
- `@RestController`
- `@GetMapping`, `@PostMapping`, `@PutMapping`, `@DeleteMapping`
- `@PathVariable`, `@RequestBody`
- `ResponseEntity` with proper HTTP status codes
hints: Use @RequestBody on POST and PUT method parameters to deserialize JSON
